      <title>Michigan Holds Off UConn 69-63 To Win NCAA Title</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284947/Michigan-Holds-Off-UConn-69-63-To-Win-NCAA-Title</link>
      <description><p>Before Michigan took the floor to face Gonzaga in the title game of the Players Era Championship back in November, Elliot Cadeau made a comment to his teammates.</p>
<p>"We're the best team ever assembled," Cadeau said at the time.</p>
<p>Michigan proceeded to go out and beat Gonzaga by 40.</p>
<p>From that point on, the Wolverines were the most dominant team in the country -- and they ended Monday the same way they looked all the way back on Thanksgiving Eve: as the best team in college basketball.</p>
<p>Michigan put an exclamation point on a historic season in Monday's national championship game, beating UConn 69-63. Cadeau was named Most Outstanding Player after finishing with 19 points.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 00:07:25 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284947/Michigan-Holds-Off-UConn-69-63-To-Win-NCAA-Title</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/May_Dusty_mich_260316.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Bulls Fire Arturas Karnisovas, Marc Eversley From Front Office Roles</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284943/Bulls-Fire-Arturas-Karnisovas-Marc-Eversley-From-Front-Office-Roles</link>
      <description><p>The Chicago Bulls have fired VP of basketball operations Arturas Karnisovas and GM Marc Eversley. Chicago is moving on from Karnisovas after six seasons of leading the team's front office.</p>
<p>Bulls President and CEO and Michael Reinsdorf said that the has "not had the success that our fans deserve" and that it was his "responsibility to go in a new direction".</p>
<p>Reinsdorf acknowledging feeling the fans' frustration, while saying he's "fully committed to getting this right."</p>
<p>Chicago went 224-254 under Karnisovas' time leading the front office. The Bulls had made three consecutive appearances in the Play-In Tournament, before missing the postseason this year. Overall, Chicago made one playoff appearance in Karnisovas' six years in charge.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 15:21:23 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284943/Bulls-Fire-Arturas-Karnisovas-Marc-Eversley-From-Front-Office-Roles</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Karnisovas_Arturas_chi_250619.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Michael Malone To Be Next North Carolina Head Coach</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284944/Michael-Malone-To-Be-Next-North-Carolina-Head-Coach</link>
      <description><p>Veteran NBA head coach Michael Malone is headed to the college ranks for his next job. Malone is set to be the next head coach for the University of North Carolina Tar Heels.</p>
<p>Before working for ESPN this season, Malone had spent the last 12 seasons as an NBA head coach. He worked for the Sacramento Kings for two years, before spending 10 seasons with the Denver Nuggets.</p>
<p>With the Nuggets, Malone won the 2023 NBA Finals. Overall, he led Denver to six consecutive playoff appearances before being fired near the end of last regular season.</p>
<p>North Carolina dismissed Hubert Davis following the team's NCAA Tournament loss. Davis led the Tar Heels to four NCAA Tournament appearances over his five seasons.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 15:32:00 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284944/Michael-Malone-To-Be-Next-North-Carolina-Head-Coach</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Malone_Michael_den_230109.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Victor Wembanyama Exits Monday's Game With Rib Injury, Award Eligibility At Risk</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284945/Victor-Wembanyama-Exits-Mondays-Game-With-Rib-Injury-Award-Eligibility-At-Risk</link>
      <description><p>The San Antonio Spurs ruled Victor Wembanyama out for the second half of Monday's game against the Philadelphia 76ers due to a left rib contusion. The 22-year-old big man sustained the injury in a collision with 76ers forward Paul George near half-court.</p>
<p>The contact occurred with 10:47 remaining in the second quarter as Wembanyama received a pass during a transition sequence. He initially subbed out and went to the locker room before returning to the bench with 6:49 left in the first half. Wembanyama then requested a second substitution with 44.3 seconds before intermission and did not return after halftime.</p>
<p>Wembanyama logged 15 minutes and 40 seconds, which will count toward postseason award eligibility. Players receive two exceptions to the standard 20-minute requirement, provided they play at least 15 minutes. He finished with 17 points, five rebounds and three blocks.</p>
<p>The runaway favorite for NBA Defensive Player of the Year and <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284871/Shai-Gilgeous-Alexander-Maintains-Sizable-NBA-MVP-Straw-Poll-Lead-Over-Victor-Wembanyama">a legitimate MVP contender</a>, Wembanyama must play at least 20 minutes in one of San Antonio's final three games to preserve his award eligibility.</p>
<p>The injury interrupts a dominant stretch for the French center. He had posted at least 30 points and 15 rebounds with three blocks in three consecutive games, tied for the second-longest such streak since blocks were officially tracked in 1973-74, trailing only Shaquille O'Neal's four-game run in 1999, per ESPN Research.</p>
<p>Wembanyama entered Monday leading the San Antonio Spurs in scoring (24.9 points per game), rebounds (11.6) and blocks (3.1).</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 22:50:49 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284945/Victor-Wembanyama-Exits-Mondays-Game-With-Rib-Injury-Award-Eligibility-At-Risk</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Wembanyama_Victor_sas_241010.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Cooper Flagg Overtakes Kon Knueppel As NBA Rookie Of The Year Favorite After Historic 96-Point Weekend</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284934/Cooper-Flagg-Overtakes-Kon-Knueppel-As-NBA-Rookie-Of-The-Year-Favorite-After-Historic-96-Point-Weekend</link>
      <description><p>Cooper Flagg has surged to the top of <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/nba/awards/by-type/Rookie-of-the-Year/5">NBA Rookie of the Year</a> <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/betting/">betting markets</a> after a record-setting two-game stretch. The 19-year-old Dallas Mavericks forward totaled 96 points over the weekend, overtaking Kon Knueppel of the Charlotte Hornets as the frontrunner. <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284872/Kon-Knueppel-Leads-NBA-Rookie-Of-The-Year-Straw-Poll-Over-Cooper-Flagg">Knueppel received 80 votes first place votes compared to 20 for Flagg in last week's ESPN straw poll</a>. </p>
<p>DraftKings Sportsbook now lists Flagg at -250, with Knueppel dropping to +180. Knueppel had entered the weekend as the -300 favorite, with Flagg at +225.</p>
<p>Flagg posted 51 points Friday against the Orlando Magic, a teenage record, then added 45 points, nine assists and eight rebounds in Sunday's 134-128 victory over the Los Angeles Lakers. He became the first rookie since Allen Iverson to average at least 45 points, five rebounds and five assists across a two-game stretch, and the only teenager to accomplish the feat.</p>
<p>According to ESPN Research, Flagg is the first rookie to score 45 or more points in back-to-back games since Walt Bellamy in 1962. He now has three of the four 45-point performances by a teenager in NBA history. The five other rookies with three such games, Bellamy, Wilt Chamberlain, Michael Jordan, Earl Monroe and Lew Alcindor, all won Rookie of the Year and are Hall of Famers.</p>
<p>"I don't know if he's making a closing statement," said Jason Kidd. "I think he's doing what he's been doing all season. Being able to play different positions. Being able to be uncomfortable. He's never complained and has delivered for us. Tonight, being able to do it on national television, it's not easy. Especially coming off a 50-ball. He wants to win, and he helped the team win tonight."</p>
<p>Flagg leads all rookies in scoring at 20.8 points per game and ranks among qualifiers in both rebounding (6.6) and assists (4.5). He is one of only four rookies since the ABA-NBA merger, alongside Larry Bird, Jordan and Luka Doncic, to average at least 20 points, six rebounds and four assists.</p>
<p>"He's obviously special," said LeBron James, who scored 30 points, with 15 assists and nine rebounds in defeat. "He's getting better and better and better."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 07:21:06 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284934/Cooper-Flagg-Overtakes-Kon-Knueppel-As-NBA-Rookie-Of-The-Year-Favorite-After-Historic-96-Point-Weekend</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Flagg_Cooper_dal_251103.jpg" />
   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Cade Cunningham Expected To Return From Collapsed Lung Before Playoffs</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284946/Cade-Cunningham-Expected-To-Return-From-Collapsed-Lung-Before-Playoffs</link>
      <description><p>Cade Cunningham was upgraded to doubtful before being ruled out of Monday night's 123-107 loss by the Detroit Pistons to the Orlando Magic. The move signals the Eastern Conference's top seed could have its star player back before the playoffs begin.</p>
<p>Cunningham has been sidelined since March 19 with a collapsed left lung and has since entered a return-to-play protocol. Center Isaiah Stewart, out since March 15 with a left calf strain, was also elevated to doubtful before being ruled out Monday.</p>
<p>"Both of them are progressing. They are doing more and more each day," said Pistons coach J.B. Bickerstaff. "With both of these things, it is always about how you respond the next day. I don't want to jump out there and say anything, but so far, so good. They are taking steps in the right direction."</p>
<p>Bickerstaff expressed optimism that both Cunningham and Stewart will return before the postseason opens. The Detroit Pistons have three regular season games remaining.</p>
<p>Detroit has proven resilient during Cunningham's absence, clinching the No. 1 overall seed in the Eastern Conference with a win over the Philadelphia 76ers on Saturday. The Pistons remain the most dominant team in the East despite losing their primary offensive engine.</p>
<p>Before the injury, Cunningham was generating MVP consideration, averaging 24.5 points and 9.9 assists per game. Stewart's availability would also bolster a frontcourt depth the Pistons will need heading into a postseason run.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 22:56:32 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284946/Cade-Cunningham-Expected-To-Return-From-Collapsed-Lung-Before-Playoffs</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Cunningham_Cade_det_250423.jpg" />
   </item>

      <title>WNBA's Sky Trade Angel Reese To Dream For '27, '28 First-Round Picks</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284941/WNBAs-Sky-Trade-Angel-Reese-To-Dream-For-27-28-First-Round-Picks</link>
      <description><p>The Chicago Sky have traded two-time WNBA All-Star Angel Reese to the Atlanta Dream for a 2027 first-round pick and 2028 first-round pick, sources told ESPN's Kendra Andrews on Monday.</p>
<p>The Dream also will receive 2028 second-round swap rights, sources told ESPN.</p>
<p>Last season, Reese led the WNBA in rebounds per game (12.6) for the second consecutive year. She also led the league in double-doubles (23) while also pacing the Sky in scoring (14.7 points) and assists (3.7).</p></description>
      <pubDate>Mon, 06 Apr 2026 11:41:07 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284941/WNBAs-Sky-Trade-Angel-Reese-To-Dream-For-27-28-First-Round-Picks</guid>

   </item>
   <item>
      <title>Bucks Could Part Ways With Or Reassign Doc Rivers; Taylor Jenkins Emerging As Candidate</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284929/Bucks-Could-Part-Ways-With-Or-Reassign-Doc-Rivers;-Taylor-Jenkins-Emerging-As-Candidate</link>
      <description><p>The Milwaukee Bucks could re-assign or part ways with head coach Doc Rivers this offseason, according to Marc Stein of The Stein Line.</p>
<p>Rivers has a record of 95 wins and 100 losses in just over two seasons with the team. The Bucks hired Rivers in January 2024 after abruptly firing Adrian Griffin as head coach.</p>
<p>Rivers was also recently announced <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284901/Candace-Parker-Amare-Stoudemire-Doc-Rivers-Headline-2026-Hall-Of-Fame-Class">as an inductee</a> into the Basketball Hall of Fame for the 2026 class.</p>
<p>Former Grizzlies coach Taylor Jenkins has emerged as a possible candidate to be the team's next head coach should the Bucks replace Rivers.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 21:27:20 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284929/Bucks-Could-Part-Ways-With-Or-Reassign-Doc-Rivers;-Taylor-Jenkins-Emerging-As-Candidate</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Rivers_Doc_mil_240226.jpg" />
   </item>

      <title>Pressure 'Mounting' On Arturas Karnisovas; UNC Remain Interested In Billy Donovan</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284930/Pressure-Mounting-On-Arturas-Karnisovas;-UNC-Remain-Interested-In-Billy-Donovan</link>
      <description><p>Pressure is "mounting" on Chicago Bulls executive vice president Arturas Karnisovas, sources told Marc Stein of The Stein Line.</p>
<p>With Karnisovas in his sixth year as a Bulls' executive, the franchise is scheduled to have "pivotal" meetings to discuss its direction and whether Karnisovas will be retained.</p>
<p>The team is set to miss the playoffs for the eighth time in the past nine seasons.</p>
<p>Stein adds that the Bulls are looking to retain Billy Donovan as head coach.</p>
<p>UNC is interested in hiring Donovan, though Donovan is not looking to make any decisions before the end of the regular season on April 12. </p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 21:58:48 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284930/Pressure-Mounting-On-Arturas-Karnisovas;-UNC-Remain-Interested-In-Billy-Donovan</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Karnisovas_Arturas_chi_250619.jpg" />
   </item>

      <title>Luka Doncic To Receive Medical Treatment In Europe For Hamstring Strain</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284933/Luka-Doncic-To-Receive-Medical-Treatment-In-Europe-For-Hamstring-Strain</link>
      <description><p>Luka Doncic will head to Europe to seek specialized medical treatment in an attempt to expedite his return from a Grade 2 hamstring strain, sources told Shams Charania and Dave McMenamin of ESPN.</p>
<p>The decision was made in consultation with the Lakers and his own medical team.</p>
<p>Doncic suffered the injury <a href="jhttps://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284886/Luka-Doncic-Out-For-Regular-Season-With-Grade-2-Hamstring-Strain-Playoff-Status-Uncertain">last Thursday</a>, with the guard one game below the 65-game threshold required for end-of-season award eligibility. </p>
<p>Doncic is averaging a league-high 33.5 points in 64 games this season.</p>
<p>The Lakers also <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284902/Austin-Reaves-Expected-To-Miss-4-6-Weeks-With-Oblique-Injury">lost Austin Reaves</a> this weekend for 4-6 weeks with an oblique injury. </p>
<p> </p>
<p> </p></description>

      <title>WNBA Free Agency Starts Monday; Signings To Begin On Saturday</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284948/WNBA-Free-Agency-Starts-Monday;-Signings-To-Begin-On-Saturday</link>
      <description><p>The WNBA announced that the free agency period will begin on Monday, with teams allowed to send qualifying offers and offer core player designations.</p>
<p>Negotiations will run Wednesday through Friday, with signings set to begin on Saturday.</p>
<p>There are currently over 100 free agents in the league.</p>
<p>Monday began with <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284941/WNBAs-Sky-Trade-Angel-Reese-To-Dream-For-27-28-First-Round-Picks">Angel Reese getting traded</a> from Chicago to Atlanta. </p>
<p>The WNBA Draft is scheduled for April 13, with training camp set to begin April 19.</p>
<p>The regular season begins May 8.</p></description>
      <pubDate>Tue, 07 Apr 2026 01:06:01 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284948/WNBA-Free-Agency-Starts-Monday;-Signings-To-Begin-On-Saturday</guid>

<p>The NBA regular season enters its final week this Monday, April 6, as the <strong>Portland Trail Blazers</strong> travel to the Mile High City to face the <strong>Denver Nuggets</strong> at Ball Arena. Denver (50-28) currently holds the fourth seed in the Western Conference and is riding a scorching eight-game winning streak as they fight for home-court advantage in the first round. </p>

<p>Meanwhile, the Trail Blazers (40-38) are in a desperate fight for their postseason lives. With every victory crucial in a crowded West, tonight's matchup is a high-stakes late-season showdown. Catch the action live on Fubo. </p>
<p>The star power in this matchup features an elite blend of triple-double mastery and rising offensive firepower. Portland counters with the high-scoring play of <strong>Deni Avdija</strong>-who has emerged as a primary engine for the Blazers-and the explosive rookie potential of <strong>Donovan Clingan</strong>.</p>
<p>Portland's young core, featuring <strong>Scoot Henderson</strong>, will face the ultimate test against a Denver defense that ranks among the league's best in protecting the paint. You can witness this Western Conference clash streaming live on Fubo.</p>
<p><a href="https://www.fubo.tv/stream/nba/?irad=1846663&irmp=3589123&subId1=RealGM" target="_blank" rel="noopener"> <input style="background-color: #ea7910; color: #ffffff; border-color: #141414; border-radius: 65px; cursor: pointer; border-width: 3px; padding: 10px; margin: 10px;" type="button" value="LIVE STREAM NBA ACTION ON FUBO" /> </a></p>
<p>Denver's ability to control the tempo through Jokić will be vital, especially against a Blazers squad that has been resilient on the glass this season. Portland will look to push the pace to exploit the Nuggets' transition defense, relying on their youth to create high-percentage opportunities. Expect an electric atmosphere in Denver as the regular season reaches its fever pitch.</p>
<p>With postseason seeding on the line for both teams, this Monday night showdown is essential viewing for NBA fans, and Fubo is your home for the complete broadcast.</p>

      <title>Dusty May Commits To Michigan, Won't Leave For North Carolina Job</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284932/Dusty-May-Commits-To-Michigan-Wont-Leave-For-North-Carolina-Job</link>
      <description><p>Michigan head coach Dusty May has told university officials he is not seeking other coaching positions, according to ESPN sources. The move effectively ends any possibility of May landing at North Carolina, which had identified him as an early candidate.</p>
<p>May's pursuit was never serious given Michigan's run to Monday's national championship game against UConn. The Wolverines finished 36-3, claimed the Big Ten regular-season title and recorded 29 double-digit victories.</p>
<p>"I think it's well-documented how happy I am at Michigan," May said Friday. "Obviously, my private life, my personal life, my family, their happiness is very important."</p>
<p>May signed a contract extension last year that runs through 2030. Departing for another program this spring would trigger a $7 million buyout.</p>
<p>North Carolina dismissed Hubert Davis last month following five seasons. The Tar Heels surrendered a 19-point lead to VCU in the first round, marking back-to-back first-round exits.</p>
<p>Arizona's Tommy Lloyd, considered the primary target for the Chapel Hill post, agreed to a fresh five-year contract to remain in Tucson on Friday. With both Lloyd and May unavailable, Chicago Bulls head coach Billy Donovan is expected to emerge as a leading candidate for the Carolina vacancy.</p></description>

   <item>
      <title>UCLA Beats South Carolina 79-51 For First Women's NCAA Title</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284927/UCLA-Beats-South-Carolina-79-51-For-First-Womens-NCAA-Title</link>
      <description><p>UCLA won its first NCAA women's basketball championship Sunday, routing South Carolina 79-51 in the national title game in Phoenix. The 28-point margin ranks as the third largest in Division I women's championship history.</p>
<p>The Bruins never trailed, building a double-digit lead after the first quarter and extending their winning streak to 31 games. Lauren Betts was named the Final Four's Most Outstanding Player.</p>
<p>"We got whooped. Not beat. We got whooped," South Carolina's Raven Johnson said.</p>
<p>Five UCLA players reached double figures. Gabriela Jaquez led all scorers with 21 points, 10 rebounds and five assists. Betts added 14 points and 11 rebounds.</p>
<p>South Carolina's three primary contributors, Joyce Edwards, Ta'Niya Latson and Johnson, combined for just 15 points on 5-of-22 shooting. The Gamecocks finished at 29% from the field, their worst shooting performance in tournament history.</p>
<p>UCLA opened the second half on a 12-3 run to put the game beyond reach. The victory ended a 48-year wait since the program's 1978 AIAW title, with that era's standout Ann Meyers Drysdale in attendance Sunday.</p>
<p>"My dream was to be at UCLA," Jaquez said. "We were determined, the core group, to do something UCLA hadn't done before in the NCAA era. We always believed. Job is finished."</p>
<p>Coach Cori Close, in her 15th season leading the program, became the longest-tenured single-school head coach to claim a first NCAA championship.</p>
<p>"It's immeasurably more than I could ask or imagine," Close said. "It's beyond my wildest dreams."</p></description>
      <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 18:59:21 EDT</pubDate>
      <guid>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284927/UCLA-Beats-South-Carolina-79-51-For-First-Womens-NCAA-Title</guid>
      <media:thumbnail url="https://basketball.realgm.com/images/nba/4.2/wiretap/photos/2006/Logo_UCLA.jpg" />
   </item>

      <title>Yaxel Lendeborg On Playing National Title With MCL, Ankle Sprain: 'I Will Be On That Floor'</title>
      <link>https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284919/Yaxel-Lendeborg-On-Playing-National-Title-With-MCL-Ankle-Sprain-I-Will-Be-On-That-Floor</link>
      <description><p>Yaxel Lendeborg suffered a left MCL sprain and left ankle sprain during <a href="https://basketball.realgm.com/wiretap/284910/Michigan-Defeats-Arizona-91-73-Will-Face-UConn-In-National-Title-Game">Michigan's win over Arizona</a> in the Final Four on Saturday night.</p>
<p>"I will be on that floor in that game," Lendeborg said of playing in Monday night's national title game against UConn.</p>
<p>Lendeborg finished with 11 points in just 14 minutes as he also picked up two early fouls.</p>
<p>Michigan trainer Chris Williams said that he was "very confident" that Lendeborg could play Monday and that the injury "presented" well.</p>
<p>Lendeborg added that he knows his role heading into Monday's game.</p>
<p>"I didn't feel much pain on the plant. So I mean ... when I play Monday, I'm going to be a corner 3-point shooter," said Lendeborg.</p></description>
